TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Malataw, title = Malataw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Malataw} }

S.FORM: == satangahan : == Malataw, u tabaki ipabaway a di'tu. u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :造物神,獵神,最高神祉 u canan ku Malataw(Malataw是什麼?)ː namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː ==
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == mar~ɾataw, u tabaki ipabawaj a diʔ~ʡtu. u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam :***,**,**** u ʦanan ku mar~ɾataw(mar~ɾataw***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan * ==
S.FORM: == satangahan : == Malataw, u tabaki ipabaway a di'tu. u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :造物神,獵神,最高神祉 u canan ku Malataw(Malataw是什麼?)ː namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː ==
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == mar~ɾataw, u tabaki ipabawaj a diʔ~ʡtu. u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam :***,**,**** u ʦanan ku mar~ɾataw(mar~ɾataw***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan * ==
